scripts.build: npm --workspace @ecommerce/shared run build && npm --workspace @ecommerce/auth-service run build && npm --workspace @ecommerce/product-service run build && npm --workspace @ecommerce/order-service run build && npm --workspace @ecommerce/web run build
scripts.test:api: npm --workspace @ecommerce/auth-service run test:api && npm --workspace @ecommerce/product-service run test:api && npm --workspace @ecommerce/order-service run test:api && npm --workspace @ecommerce/platform-tests run test:api
